scripts.check: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); if (!pkg.scripts || !pkg.scripts.check) throw new Error('check script missing'); if (!pkg.dependencies || !pkg.dependencies['ffmpeg-static']) throw new Error('ffmpeg-static dependency declaration missing'); console.log('npm check passed: package metadata valid');"
